name: ssot-equiv-goals
description: Generate generic SSOT-traced FL-vs-RTL equivalence goals before TB generation

items.content: Read SSOT, FL model, decomposition, and FCOV plan as the equivalence source of truth
items.detail: Use <ip>/yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml, <ip>/model/functional_model.py, <ip>/model/decomposition.json, and <ip>/cov/fcov_plan.json. Do not infer behavior from RTL. If function_model or cycle_model is missing or under-specified, emit a precise SSOT question instead of inventing expected behavior.
items.criteria:
Current SSOT was read
function_model transactions were enumerated
cycle_model latency/handshake/ordering rules were enumerated
decomposition units were mapped
fcov bins were mapped
No RTL observed behavior was used as expected behavior

items.detail: Generate stable goal IDs for SSOT scenarios, function_model transactions, cycle rules, register/memory behavior, FSM transitions, error policies, and debug observability when present. Each goal must state SSOT refs, stimulus contract, expected_contract using FunctionalModel.apply, RTL observables/check intent, pass criteria, coverage refs, and owner_on_fail routing.
items.criteria:
equivalence_goals.json exists
schema_version is present
summary.total > 0
Every goal has goal_id, kind, ssot_refs, stimulus_contract, expected_contract, pass_criteria, owner_on_fail, blocked, and blocker
Blocked goals have human/ssot ownership and a precise blocker reason

items.content: Validate goal file for generic TB/sim_debug consumption
items.detail: Run the deterministic generator and inspect the JSON summary. The artifact must be usable by tb-gen scoreboards and sim_debug comparators. If any required expected behavior is missing, leave the goal blocked rather than filling fake expected values.
items.criteria:
Generator exits 0 when no blocked goals remain
Generator exits nonzero when SSOT behavior is blocked
Generated output names <ip>/verify/equivalence_goals.json
Goal count and blocked count are reported
No IP-name special case or fixed protocol branch was added
